title: hieracium erythrochristum
intro: Hieracium erythrochristum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Hieracium erythrochristum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
